items.title: BioMedical Internship
items.description: Completed a winter internship at Mahaveer Hospital, Indore, where I gained exposure to the role of biomedical engineers in a hospital environment. The experience involved observing medical equipment management, maintenance procedures, biomedical instrumentation, and the integration of healthcare technology to support patient care and clinical operations.

items.title: BioMedical Engineering
items.description: Completed foundational training in biomedical engineering concepts, medical equipment management, hospital technology systems, and healthcare engineering practices through hospital-based exposure.

items.title: Python programming
items.description: Completed training in Python programming fundamentals including variables, data structures, functions, object-oriented programming, and problem-solving techniques.

items.title: Smart India Hackathon
items.description: Part of the winning team in the university-level Smart India Hackathon selection process, developing an innovative technology solution and advancing through competitive project evaluation.

items.title: Medha Hackathon
items.description: Participated in a national innovation-focused hackathon, collaborating on technology-driven solutions while gaining experience in rapid prototyping, teamwork, and problem-solving.

items.title: Resurgence Hackathon
items.description: Participated in a competitive innovation challenge involving idea development, technical implementation, and collaborative solution design under constrained timelines.

items.title: Patent Submission Under Evaluation
items.description: Prepared and submitted a patent application based on an engineering innovation. The submission is currently undergoing evaluation and review.

items.title: Engineering Project Portfolio
items.description: Designed and developed multiple projects spanning healthcare technology, embedded systems, robotics, IoT, software development, and control systems engineering.
